title: nopCommerce
description: Open-source ASP.NET Core e-commerce platform and shopping cart for building online stores.
installation: First run launches the nopCommerce install wizard at the app URL: pick the PostgreSQL provider and enter the connection details below (host nopcommerce-postgresql-rw, port 5432, db/user/pass = nopcommerce). The wizard creates the admin user you specify and writes config to /app/App_Data (persisted via the data volume). Rotate the default postgres password after install. nopCommerce can run without the DB add-on against SQL Server/MySQL too, but this template ships PostgreSQL. Optional: front with a CDN/object storage for media at scale; not required to boot.
